element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Foundational mechanic, no enemies present at start
Scattered throughout first level, teaches resource collection
Introduced with simple pits and platforms
Attack form; curling into ball damages enemies
Defeatable by spin attack; destroying optional (not required for completion)
High-speed curved sections; requires maintained momentum
Hazard requiring spatial awareness and jump timing
Respawn markers; reduce penalty of death
Pattern-based combat; first boss is manageable introduction
Rotational maze with bumpers; parallel progression track
Each zone introduces new hazards: lava, water, wind, etc.
Progressive difficulty; later zones compound hazard types

typical_relief_triggers: Reaching safe platforms after hazard sequences
typical_tension_triggers: High-speed sections with tight jump timing
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Fast-paced with momentum-driven rhythm; tension builds through obstacle density and hazard stacking, relieves via checkpoint safety and ring collection. Acts progress from exploration-friendly to combat/hazard-intense, with boss gates forcing skill consolidation.

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Bonus stage access requires 50+ rings at act end; green large ring appears as visual marker

difficulty_curve.early_game: Green Hill Zone establishes all core mechanics in safe context; enemies optional; abundant rings and power-ups
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Marble, Spring, Labyrinth Zones increase hazard density, introduce zone-specific mechanics (lava platforming, underwater sections, conveyor systems), and tighten ring availability
difficulty_curve.late_game: Star Light and Spring Zones combine multiple hazard types; boss fights demand pattern recognition; Final Zone serves as climactic skill check
notable_spikes: Transition from Green Hill to Marble Zone (introduction of lava hazard + tighter platforming)
Labyrinth Zone (underwater physics change and pressure sections)

notable_level_patterns.pattern_name: Act structure (3 acts + boss per zone)
notable_level_patterns.description: Each of 6 main zones contains 3 sequential acts building in complexity, culminating in Dr. Eggman boss fight. Final Zone is single-act climax.
Primary level traversal follows left-to-right progression; slopes, springs, and curves maintain speed; obstacles require maintaining or modulating velocity rather than stopping
Each zone introduces distinct environmental hazard (lava, water, conveyor, wind) that defines mechanical focus and teaches zone-specific skills
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Marble Zone (lava platforms), Labyrinth Zone (underwater breathing), Starlight Zone (speed traps)

notable_level_patterns.description: Ring density remains high in early acts; checkpoints spaced to allow recovery from mistakes; denser enemy placement after checkpoints
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Green Hill Zone (loose ring distribution guides early learning)

notable_level_patterns.description: 50+ ring threshold at act exits creates optional parallel progression; bonus stages are risk/reward propositions (players can fail and lose emerald opportunity)
